name: luxus-parceiros
description: Luxus Parceiros - Ecossistema SaaS para gestão de parceiros Luxus Telefonia

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/types build && corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/utils build && corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/ui build && corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/web build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/types lint && corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/utils lint && corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/ui lint && corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/api lint && corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/mobile lint && corepack pnpm --filter @luxus/web lint
